What I Do

Services That Actually Move the Needle

🏗️
Community Management

Active moderation and management that keeps your community organized, engaged, and growing. I build the systems, set the culture, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.

Full Management
🚀
Growth Strategy

I design and execute growth strategies that drive real numbers, not vanity metrics. Structure first, scale second.

Growth Ops
🎯
Ambassador Programs

I build ambassador programs from the ground up: recruitment, onboarding, performance tracking, and accountability. Turn your community into an army of advocates.

Ambassador Lead
🔗
Ecosystem Engagement

Daily engagement systems, organized activities, and structured communication that keep users active, loyal, and invested in your project long-term.

Retention & Activation
Proof of Work

Communities I've Built & Scaled

QwertiAI
Ambassador Community Lead●DeFi
2026 to Present
01 / 03
The Challenge

No structured ambassador program existed. No onboarding system, no defined roles, no centralized management. Community growth was inconsistent, uncoordinated, and largely untapped.

What I Did

Designed and led the ambassador program from zero, building clear structure for recruitment, onboarding, and performance tracking. Established accountability and direction across the entire ambassador network.

Key Results
1,200+
Ambassador apps in 24 hours
150+
Active ambassadors onboarded
2.9K→5.6K
Followers grown
$80M+
Swap volume contributed
15,000+
Traders reached
“I don't just manage communities. I turn them into high-performance systems that generate real results.”
K2 PowerBlock
Community Lead & Manager
2025 to Present
02 / 03
The Challenge

No active community. No engaged user base, no communication flow, no ambassador coordination, no retention systems. The entire community layer had to be built from absolute zero.

What I Did

Took full ownership, built from the ground up. Introduced daily engagement systems, led ambassador coordination, created consistent communication, organized interactive activities, and acted as bridge between core team and community.

Key Results
0→1,400+
Members from scratch
Daily
Active engagement established
100%
Built from zero infrastructure
“I can build and scale communities from zero, creating structure, engagement, and momentum where nothing previously existed.”
DFM
Community Manager●DeFi
2025 to Present
03 / 03
The Challenge

Few community members across platforms. No engagement systems, no structure, no strategy for attracting or retaining users. The project lacked a foundational community layer entirely.

What I Did

Built the community across Telegram and X simultaneously. Introduced engagement strategies, encouraged active participation, created consistent communication, and turned passive members into active contributors.

Key Results
0→500+
Members in one month
2x
Platforms grown simultaneously
Active
Engagement built from ground up
“I don't just grow numbers. I build engaged communities where users actively participate and contribute to the ecosystem.”
Why Sonia

Three Reasons Clients Choose Me

01
Proven Ability to Build from Zero to Scale

I don't need an existing system. I create structure where none exists and turn it into a high-performing growth engine, fast. Every project I've touched started from zero.

02
Community That Actually Converts

I don't chase vanity metrics. I build communities and networks that drive real outcomes: users, engagement, and platform activity. Numbers mean nothing without conversion.

03
Leadership, Not Just Management

I don't just “run” communities. I lead, align, and scale people into coordinated teams that execute consistently and deliver results. There's a big difference.
